title: Delhi High Court grants interim relief to Karisma Kapoor, restrains Priya Kapur from alienating Sunjay Kapur's assets
description: The Delhi High Court on Thursday allowed an interim injunction plea filed by Bollywood actor Karisma Kapoor’s two children and restrained their stepmother, Priya Sachdev Kapur, from creating any third-party rights over the assets left behind by late industrialist Sunjay Kapur.Priya Kapur is the widow of Sunjay Kapur who passed away in 2025. Sunjay was earlier married to Karisma Kapoor before divorcing her and marrying Priya Kapur.Justice Jyoti Singh on Thursday said that Karisma Kapoor and Sunja
